name: Ceridian Dayforce
description: Monitor employee access, role assignments, and sync employee records from Ceridian Dayforce HCM

config.setupInstructions:
1. Contact your Dayforce admin for API access credentials
2. You will need: your Dayforce host URL, client namespace, and a service account username/password
3. The host is the domain from your Dayforce URL (e.g. usXXservices.dayforcehcm.com)
4. The namespace is your company identifier in the API path

credentialFields.label: Dayforce Host
credentialFields.helpText: Your Dayforce instance hostname (e.g. usXXservices.dayforcehcm.com or your-company.dayforcehcm.com)

credentialFields.label: Client Namespace
credentialFields.helpText: The company identifier used in API paths (provided by your Dayforce admin)

credentialFields.label: API Username
credentialFields.helpText: Dayforce service account username for API access

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all employees from Dayforce and verifies their employment status is tracked

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that employees have defined roles assigned in Dayforce for proper access control
